templates.airport_transfer: Absolutely, I can help with that airport transfer. Are you going to Hosea Kutako Airport or coming from the airport?
templates.price_request: I can estimate that for you. Please send pickup, drop-off, passengers, luggage and vehicle type.
templates.booking_request: Sure, I can help you book. I’ll just need pickup, drop-off, date, time, passengers and vehicle preference.
templates.invoice_request: Of course. Please send your booking number or quote number, and I’ll help create or find your invoice.
templates.payment_support: Thank you. I can help verify your payment. Please send your booking number or payment reference, then upload or paste your proof of payment.
templates.driver_late: I’m really sorry about that. I’ll treat this as urgent. Please send your booking number or phone number so support can trace the driver.
templates.lost_item: I’m sorry about that. I’ll help create a lost-item ticket. Please send your booking number, item description and phone number.
templates.tourism: Welcome to Namibia 🇳🇦 I can help you explore desert, coast, safari and city routes. Are you interested in Sossusvlei, Etosha, Swakopmund, Walvis Bay or Windhoek city?
templates.fallback: I can help with transport, pricing, booking, payments, invoices, tracking or support. What would you like to do?
